$schema_note: Pre-registered ground-truth manifest for the Phase-1 regression-recall experiment. Sealed BEFORE any arm runs (docs/phase-1-experiment.md). The harness compares each arm's observations against `expected_observation` (Jaccard >= 0.6 with substring tolerance) to compute recall. Editing this file post-run invalidates the run.

regressions.expected_observation: search results list is empty (no items rendered)

regressions.description: SAVE10 coupon accepted with subtotal < 50 (predicate violated)
regressions.expected_observation: POST /cart/apply with coupon SAVE10 and subtotal 49 returns 200 applied=true

regressions.description: Two coupons stack in the same cart (only one should apply)
regressions.expected_observation: POST /cart/apply accepts a second coupon while the first is still active

regressions.description: POST /orders with the same Idempotency-Key creates two distinct order_ids
regressions.expected_observation: POST /orders with the same Idempotency-Key returns two distinct order_ids

regressions.description: Non-admin user reaches /settings/admin without auth check
regressions.expected_observation: GET /settings/admin returns 200 admin content for a non-admin session
GET /list page=2 with filter applied returns items without the filter

regressions.description: POST /session returns 200 + cookie but the session is invalid; an R-mode arm trusting believed signals blindly passes this regression
regressions.expected_observation: session cookie set on login but follow-up authenticated request fails
